---
title: "Hideo Ishima"
---

This is Hideo Ishima's website.

## About Me

Hideo ISHIMA is an associate professor at Kyoto University. His research focuses on political parties, legislative behavior, and Japanese politics. It has been published in Electoral Studies, Legislative Studies Quarterly, Journal of Election, Public Opinion and Parties, and Social Science Japan Journal.

I'm on leave for the academic year 2025-26, visiting at the University of Michigan.

Address: Graduate School of Law, Kyoto University, Yoshida-Honmachi, Sakyo-ku, Kyoto. 606-8501

mail:  ishima.hideo.3r [at] kyoto-u.ac.jp

Google Scholar Profile<https://scholar.google.co.jp/citations?user=8bQKmPMAAAAJ&hl=en>
